case_title: DANIEL DE SANTIAGO VS. PHILIP MARIGMEN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTIAGO, DANIEL DE AS TO DEFENDANT MARIGMEN, PHILIP AN IND. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

calendar.matters:
Mo To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Disco
Off Calendar Dec-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Assignee Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
